title: Blackspur BB-PT120 Long Reach Grab Handle - Sliver/Black
features: Can be used to pick up hard to reach items
description: Product Description Blackspur BB-PT120 long reach grab handle. This lightweight but solid design grab handle is manufactured with a comfortable grip & has an extendable reach of 74cm. It is ideal for anyone with limited mobility or anyone in need of something out of reach. Box Contains 1 x Grab Handle
